# clo_dbaas_cluster_config (Data Source)

Fetches the tunable configuration of a dbaas cluster: the live (current), datastore/flavor default, and last known-stable parameter sets. All values are read-only and rendered as strings.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "clo_dbaas_cluster_config" "cluster_config" {
  cluster_id = "3f2504e0-4f89-41d3-9a0c-0305e82c3301"
}

# Read a single tuned parameter from the live configuration.
output "max_connections" {
  value = data.clo_dbaas_cluster_config.cluster_config.current["max_connections"]
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `cluster_id` (String) ID of the dbaas cluster whose configuration is read

### Read-Only

- `current` (Map of String) The cluster's live configuration (parameter name -> value)
- `default` (Map of String) The default configuration for the cluster's datastore and flavor
- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `last_stable` (Map of String) The last known-stable configuration
